---
title: "Solow Model"
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(flextable)
```

## Solow Growth Models - Penn World Table & World Bank

```{r}

# ======== World Bank (Savings) ========


savings_rate_as_pct_gdp <- read_excel("API_NY.GNS.ICTR.ZS_DS2_en_excel_v2_330.xls", skip = 2)
savings_rate_as_pct_gdp <- clean_names(savings_rate_as_pct_gdp)

savings_rate_as_pct_gdp <- savings_rate_as_pct_gdp %>% 
  select(country_name, x2023) %>%
  filter(country_name %in% c('Ghana', 
                             'Nigeria',
                             "Cote d'Ivoire",
                             'Senegal',
                             'Cameroon',
                             'Togo',
                             'Sierra Leone',
                             'Liberia',
                             'United States')) 

# Parameters to Adjust (Must be in % format)
Nigeria_Savings_Rate = median(savings_rate_as_pct_gdp$x2023, na.rm = TRUE)
Liberia_Savings_Rate = median(savings_rate_as_pct_gdp$x2023, na.rm = TRUE)
Togo_Savings_Rate    = (16.498484 * 17.799610 * 19.5264093)^(1/3)

savings_rate_as_pct_gdp <- savings_rate_as_pct_gdp %>% 
  mutate(x2023 = ifelse(country_name == "Togo", Togo_Savings_Rate, x2023),
         x2023 = ifelse(country_name == "Nigeria", Nigeria_Savings_Rate, x2023),
         x2023 = ifelse(country_name == "Liberia", Liberia_Savings_Rate, x2023),
         country_name = ifelse(country_name == "Cote d'Ivoire", "Côte d'Ivoire", country_name),
         x2023 = x2023 / 100) %>% 
  rename(s = x2023)
  
```

```{r}

# ======== Penn World Table ========

pwt_base <- read_excel("pwt110.xlsx", sheet = "Data")
pwt_base <- clean_names(pwt_base)

pwt_base <- pwt_base %>% 
  select(country, year, rgdpo, rnna, emp, labsh, csh_i) %>%
  filter(country %in% c("Ghana", 
                        "Nigeria", 
                        "Côte d'Ivoire",
                        "Senegal", 
                        "Cameroon", 
                        "Togo", 
                        "Sierra Leone", 
                        "Liberia", 
                        "United States")) %>% 
  filter(year >= 2022)

# Parameters to Adjust (alpha)
Ghana_Labsh   = median(pwt_base$labsh, na.rm = TRUE)
Liberia_Labsh = median(pwt_base$labsh, na.rm = TRUE)

pwt_base <- pwt_base %>%
  mutate(labsh = ifelse(country == "Ghana", Ghana_Labsh, labsh),
         labsh = ifelse(country == "Liberia", Liberia_Labsh, labsh))

pwt_base <- pwt_base %>% 
  mutate(y = rgdpo / emp,
         k = rnna / emp,
         n = ((emp / lag(emp)) -1),
         d = 0.05,
         s = csh_i,
         a = (1 - labsh),
         L = emp,
         K = rnna,
         Y = rgdpo,
         A = y / k^a)

# ======== Full Solow Dataset ========

pwt_solow <- pwt_base %>% 
  filter(year == 2023) %>% 
  select(country, Y, A, K, L, y, k, a, n, d, s)

#pwt_solow <- pwt_solow %>%
#  left_join(
#    savings_rate_as_pct_gdp %>% select(country_name, s),
#    by = c("country" = "country_name"))

# ======== Full Solow Flextable ========

library(dplyr)
library(flextable)

pwt_solow_ft <- pwt_solow %>%
  mutate(
    Y = round(Y, 2),
    A = round(A, 2),
    K = round(K, 2),
    L = round(L, 2),
    y = round(y, 2),
    k = round(k, 2),
    a = round(a, 3),
    n = round(n, 3),
    d = round(d, 3),
    s = round(s, 3)
  ) %>%
  rename(
    Country = country,
    `Output (Y)` = Y,
    `Technology (A)` = A,
    `Capital (K)` = K,
    `Labor (L)` = L,
    `Output per Worker (y)` = y,
    `Capital per Worker (k)` = k,
    `Capital Share (a)` = a,
    `Labor Growth (n)` = n,
    `Depreciation (d)` = d,
    `Savings Rate (s)` = s
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = "Solow Model Parameters by Country (2023)",
    colwidths = 11
  ) %>%
  theme_box() %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#D9D9D9") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  valign(valign = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

pwt_solow_ft

```

## Models

### Côte d'Ivoire

```{r}

# ======== Côte d'Ivoire ========

CIV_solow <- pwt_solow %>%
  filter(country == "Côte d'Ivoire")

# Input Variables

CIV_a         <- CIV_solow$a[1]
CIV_s         <- CIV_solow$s[1]
CIV_n         <- CIV_solow$n[1]
CIV_d         <- CIV_solow$d[1]
CIV_A         <- CIV_solow$A[1]
CIV_k_current <- CIV_solow$k[1]
CIV_y_current <- CIV_solow$y[1]

# Steady State

CIV_k_star <- ((CIV_s * CIV_A) / (CIV_n + CIV_d))^(1 / (1 - CIV_a))
CIV_y_star <- CIV_A * CIV_k_star^CIV_a
CIV_sfk_star <- CIV_s * CIV_y_star

# Graph

CIV_solow_df <- data.frame(
  k = seq(0, CIV_k_current * 2, length.out = 500)
) %>%
  mutate(
    y = CIV_A * k^CIV_a,
    sfk = CIV_s * y,
    break_even = (CIV_n + CIV_d) * k
  )

CIV_last_point <- CIV_solow_df %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1)

ggplot(CIV_solow_df, aes(x = k)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = y), linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = sfk), linewidth = 1.2, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_line(aes(y = break_even), linewidth = 1.2, color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = CIV_k_star, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_point(aes(x = CIV_k_star, y = CIV_sfk_star), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = CIV_k_current, y = CIV_y_current), size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = CIV_last_point$k,
    y = CIV_last_point$y * 1.03,
    label = "y = f(k)",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = CIV_last_point$k,
    y = CIV_last_point$sfk * 1.03,
    label = "s f(k)",
    color = "darkgreen",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = CIV_last_point$k,
    y = CIV_last_point$break_even * 1.03,
    label = "(n + d)k",
    color = "red",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Solow Growth Model - Côte d'Ivoire",
    x = "Capital per Worker (k)",
    y = "Output / Investment per Worker"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, max(CIV_solow_df$k) * 1.15),
    clip = "off"
  )

# Flextable

CIV_ss_points <- tibble(
  Point = c(
    "Steady-State Intersection",
    "Steady-State Production",
    "Current Production"
  ),
  x_coordinate = c(
    CIV_k_star,
    CIV_k_star,
    CIV_k_current
  ),
  y_coordinate = c(
    CIV_sfk_star,
    CIV_y_star,
    CIV_y_current
  )
)

CIV_ss_points_ft <- CIV_ss_points %>%
  mutate(
    x_coordinate = round(x_coordinate, 2),
    y_coordinate = round(y_coordinate, 2)
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = "Côte d'Ivoire Solow Model Key Coordinates",
    colwidths = 3
  ) %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#D9D9D9") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  theme_box() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  valign(valign = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

CIV_ss_points_ft
```

### Cameroon

```{r}

# ======== Cameroon ========

CMR_solow <- pwt_solow %>%
  filter(country == "Cameroon")

# Input Variables

CMR_a         <- CMR_solow$a[1]
CMR_s         <- CMR_solow$s[1]
CMR_n         <- CMR_solow$n[1]
CMR_d         <- CMR_solow$d[1]
CMR_A         <- CMR_solow$A[1]
CMR_k_current <- CMR_solow$k[1]
CMR_y_current <- CMR_solow$y[1]

# Steady State

CMR_k_star <- ((CMR_s * CMR_A) / (CMR_n + CMR_d))^(1 / (1 - CMR_a))
CMR_y_star <- CMR_A * CMR_k_star^CMR_a
CMR_sfk_star <- CMR_s * CMR_y_star

# Graph

CMR_solow_df <- data.frame(
  k = seq(0, CMR_k_current * 2, length.out = 500)
) %>%
  mutate(
    y = CMR_A * k^CMR_a,
    sfk = CMR_s * y,
    break_even = (CMR_n + CMR_d) * k
  )

CMR_last_point <- CMR_solow_df %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1)

ggplot(CMR_solow_df, aes(x = k)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = y), linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = sfk), linewidth = 1.2, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_line(aes(y = break_even), linewidth = 1.2, color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = CMR_k_star, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_point(aes(x = CMR_k_star, y = CMR_sfk_star), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = CMR_k_current, y = CMR_y_current), size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = CMR_last_point$k,
    y = CMR_last_point$y * 1.03,
    label = "y = f(k)",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = CMR_last_point$k,
    y = CMR_last_point$sfk * 1.03,
    label = "s f(k)",
    color = "darkgreen",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = CMR_last_point$k,
    y = CMR_last_point$break_even * 1.03,
    label = "(n + d)k",
    color = "red",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Solow Growth Model - Cameroon",
    x = "Capital per Worker (k)",
    y = "Output / Investment per Worker"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, max(CMR_solow_df$k) * 1.15),
    clip = "off"
  )

# Flextable

CMR_ss_points <- tibble(
  Point = c(
    "Steady-State Intersection",
    "Steady-State Production",
    "Current Production"
  ),
  x_coordinate = c(
    CMR_k_star,
    CMR_k_star,
    CMR_k_current
  ),
  y_coordinate = c(
    CMR_sfk_star,
    CMR_y_star,
    CMR_y_current
  )
)

CMR_ss_points_ft <- CMR_ss_points %>%
  mutate(
    x_coordinate = round(x_coordinate, 2),
    y_coordinate = round(y_coordinate, 2)
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = "Cameroon Solow Model Key Coordinates",
    colwidths = 3
  ) %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#D9D9D9") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  theme_box() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  valign(valign = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

CMR_ss_points_ft
```

### Ghana

```{r}

# ======== Ghana ========

GHA_solow <- pwt_solow %>%
  filter(country == "Ghana")

# Input Variables

GHA_a         <- GHA_solow$a[1]
GHA_s         <- GHA_solow$s[1]
GHA_n         <- GHA_solow$n[1]
GHA_d         <- GHA_solow$d[1]
GHA_A         <- GHA_solow$A[1]
GHA_k_current <- GHA_solow$k[1]
GHA_y_current <- GHA_solow$y[1]

# Steady State

GHA_k_star <- ((GHA_s * GHA_A) / (GHA_n + GHA_d))^(1 / (1 - GHA_a))
GHA_y_star <- GHA_A * GHA_k_star^GHA_a
GHA_sfk_star <- GHA_s * GHA_y_star

# Graph

GHA_solow_df <- data.frame(
  k = seq(0, GHA_k_current * 2, length.out = 500)
) %>%
  mutate(
    y = GHA_A * k^GHA_a,
    sfk = GHA_s * y,
    break_even = (GHA_n + GHA_d) * k
  )

GHA_last_point <- GHA_solow_df %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1)

ggplot(GHA_solow_df, aes(x = k)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = y), linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = sfk), linewidth = 1.2, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_line(aes(y = break_even), linewidth = 1.2, color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = GHA_k_star, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_point(aes(x = GHA_k_star, y = GHA_sfk_star), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = GHA_k_current, y = GHA_y_current), size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = GHA_last_point$k,
    y = GHA_last_point$y * 1.03,
    label = "y = f(k)",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = GHA_last_point$k,
    y = GHA_last_point$sfk * 1.03,
    label = "s f(k)",
    color = "darkgreen",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = GHA_last_point$k,
    y = GHA_last_point$break_even * 1.03,
    label = "(n + d)k",
    color = "red",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Solow Growth Model - Ghana",
    x = "Capital per Worker (k)",
    y = "Output / Investment per Worker"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, max(GHA_solow_df$k) * 1.15),
    clip = "off"
  )

# Flextable

GHA_ss_points <- tibble(
  Point = c(
    "Steady-State Intersection",
    "Steady-State Production",
    "Current Production"
  ),
  x_coordinate = c(
    GHA_k_star,
    GHA_k_star,
    GHA_k_current
  ),
  y_coordinate = c(
    GHA_sfk_star,
    GHA_y_star,
    GHA_y_current
  )
)

GHA_ss_points_ft <- GHA_ss_points %>%
  mutate(
    x_coordinate = round(x_coordinate, 2),
    y_coordinate = round(y_coordinate, 2)
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = "Ghana Solow Model Key Coordinates",
    colwidths = 3
  ) %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#D9D9D9") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  theme_box() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  valign(valign = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

GHA_ss_points_ft
```

### Liberia

```{r}

# ======== Liberia ========

LIB_solow <- pwt_solow %>%
  filter(country == "Liberia")

# Input Variables

LIB_a         <- LIB_solow$a[1]
LIB_s         <- LIB_solow$s[1]
LIB_n         <- LIB_solow$n[1]
LIB_d         <- LIB_solow$d[1]
LIB_A         <- LIB_solow$A[1]
LIB_k_current <- LIB_solow$k[1]
LIB_y_current <- LIB_solow$y[1]

# Steady State

LIB_k_star <- ((LIB_s * LIB_A) / (LIB_n + LIB_d))^(1 / (1 - LIB_a))
LIB_y_star <- LIB_A * LIB_k_star^LIB_a
LIB_sfk_star <- LIB_s * LIB_y_star

# Graph

LIB_solow_df <- data.frame(
  k = seq(0, LIB_k_current * 2, length.out = 500)
) %>%
  mutate(
    y = LIB_A * k^LIB_a,
    sfk = LIB_s * y,
    break_even = (LIB_n + LIB_d) * k
  )

LIB_last_point <- LIB_solow_df %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1)

ggplot(LIB_solow_df, aes(x = k)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = y), linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = sfk), linewidth = 1.2, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_line(aes(y = break_even), linewidth = 1.2, color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = LIB_k_star, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_point(aes(x = LIB_k_star, y = LIB_sfk_star), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = LIB_k_current, y = LIB_y_current), size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = LIB_last_point$k,
    y = LIB_last_point$y * 1.03,
    label = "y = f(k)",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = LIB_last_point$k,
    y = LIB_last_point$sfk * 1.03,
    label = "s f(k)",
    color = "darkgreen",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = LIB_last_point$k,
    y = LIB_last_point$break_even * 1.03,
    label = "(n + d)k",
    color = "red",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Solow Growth Model - Liberia",
    x = "Capital per Worker (k)",
    y = "Output / Investment per Worker"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, max(LIB_solow_df$k) * 1.15),
    clip = "off"
  )

# Flextable

LIB_ss_points <- tibble(
  Point = c(
    "Steady-State Intersection",
    "Steady-State Production",
    "Current Production"
  ),
  x_coordinate = c(
    LIB_k_star,
    LIB_k_star,
    LIB_k_current
  ),
  y_coordinate = c(
    LIB_sfk_star,
    LIB_y_star,
    LIB_y_current
  )
)

LIB_ss_points_ft <- LIB_ss_points %>%
  mutate(
    x_coordinate = round(x_coordinate, 2),
    y_coordinate = round(y_coordinate, 2)
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = "Liberia Solow Model Key Coordinates",
    colwidths = 3
  ) %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#D9D9D9") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  theme_box() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  valign(valign = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

LIB_ss_points_ft
```

### Nigeria

```{r}

# ======== Nigeria ========

NGA_solow <- pwt_solow %>%
  filter(country == "Nigeria")

# Input Variables

NGA_a         <- NGA_solow$a[1]
NGA_s         <- NGA_solow$s[1]
NGA_n         <- NGA_solow$n[1]
NGA_d         <- NGA_solow$d[1]
NGA_A         <- NGA_solow$A[1]
NGA_k_current <- NGA_solow$k[1]
NGA_y_current <- NGA_solow$y[1]

# Steady State

NGA_k_star <- ((NGA_s * NGA_A) / (NGA_n + NGA_d))^(1 / (1 - NGA_a))
NGA_y_star <- NGA_A * NGA_k_star^NGA_a
NGA_sfk_star <- NGA_s * NGA_y_star

# Graph

NGA_solow_df <- data.frame(
  k = seq(0, NGA_k_current * 2, length.out = 500)
) %>%
  mutate(
    y = NGA_A * k^NGA_a,
    sfk = NGA_s * y,
    break_even = (NGA_n + NGA_d) * k
  )

NGA_last_point <- NGA_solow_df %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1)

ggplot(NGA_solow_df, aes(x = k)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = y), linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = sfk), linewidth = 1.2, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_line(aes(y = break_even), linewidth = 1.2, color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = NGA_k_star, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_point(aes(x = NGA_k_star, y = NGA_sfk_star), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = NGA_k_current, y = NGA_y_current), size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = NGA_last_point$k,
    y = NGA_last_point$y * 1.03,
    label = "y = f(k)",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = NGA_last_point$k,
    y = NGA_last_point$sfk * 1.03,
    label = "s f(k)",
    color = "darkgreen",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = NGA_last_point$k,
    y = NGA_last_point$break_even * 1.03,
    label = "(n + d)k",
    color = "red",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Solow Growth Model - Nigeria",
    x = "Capital per Worker (k)",
    y = "Output / Investment per Worker"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, max(NGA_solow_df$k) * 1.15),
    clip = "off"
  )

# Flextable

NGA_ss_points <- tibble(
  Point = c(
    "Steady-State Intersection",
    "Steady-State Production",
    "Current Production"
  ),
  x_coordinate = c(
    NGA_k_star,
    NGA_k_star,
    NGA_k_current
  ),
  y_coordinate = c(
    NGA_sfk_star,
    NGA_y_star,
    NGA_y_current
  )
)

NGA_ss_points_ft <- NGA_ss_points %>%
  mutate(
    x_coordinate = round(x_coordinate, 2),
    y_coordinate = round(y_coordinate, 2)
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = "Nigeria Solow Model Key Coordinates",
    colwidths = 3
  ) %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#D9D9D9") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  theme_box() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  valign(valign = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

NGA_ss_points_ft
```

### Senegal

```{r}

# ======== Senegal ========

SEN_solow <- pwt_solow %>%
  filter(country == "Senegal")

# Input Variables

SEN_a         <- SEN_solow$a[1]
SEN_s         <- SEN_solow$s[1]
SEN_n         <- SEN_solow$n[1]
SEN_d         <- SEN_solow$d[1]
SEN_A         <- SEN_solow$A[1]
SEN_k_current <- SEN_solow$k[1]
SEN_y_current <- SEN_solow$y[1]

# Steady State

SEN_k_star <- ((SEN_s * SEN_A) / (SEN_n + SEN_d))^(1 / (1 - SEN_a))
SEN_y_star <- SEN_A * SEN_k_star^SEN_a
SEN_sfk_star <- SEN_s * SEN_y_star

# Graph

SEN_solow_df <- data.frame(
  k = seq(0, SEN_k_current * 2, length.out = 500)
) %>%
  mutate(
    y = SEN_A * k^SEN_a,
    sfk = SEN_s * y,
    break_even = (SEN_n + SEN_d) * k
  )

SEN_last_point <- SEN_solow_df %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1)

ggplot(SEN_solow_df, aes(x = k)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = y), linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = sfk), linewidth = 1.2, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_line(aes(y = break_even), linewidth = 1.2, color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = SEN_k_star, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_point(aes(x = SEN_k_star, y = SEN_sfk_star), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = SEN_k_current, y = SEN_y_current), size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = SEN_last_point$k,
    y = SEN_last_point$y * 1.03,
    label = "y = f(k)",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = SEN_last_point$k,
    y = SEN_last_point$sfk * 1.03,
    label = "s f(k)",
    color = "darkgreen",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = SEN_last_point$k,
    y = SEN_last_point$break_even * 1.03,
    label = "(n + d)k",
    color = "red",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Solow Growth Model - Senegal",
    x = "Capital per Worker (k)",
    y = "Output / Investment per Worker"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, max(SEN_solow_df$k) * 1.15),
    clip = "off"
  )

# Flextable

SEN_ss_points <- tibble(
  Point = c(
    "Steady-State Intersection",
    "Steady-State Production",
    "Current Production"
  ),
  x_coordinate = c(
    SEN_k_star,
    SEN_k_star,
    SEN_k_current
  ),
  y_coordinate = c(
    SEN_sfk_star,
    SEN_y_star,
    SEN_y_current
  )
)

SEN_ss_points_ft <- SEN_ss_points %>%
  mutate(
    x_coordinate = round(x_coordinate, 2),
    y_coordinate = round(y_coordinate, 2)
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = "Senegal Solow Model Key Coordinates",
    colwidths = 3
  ) %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#D9D9D9") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  theme_box() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  valign(valign = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

SEN_ss_points_ft
```

### Sierra Leone

```{r}

# ======== Sierra Leone ========

SIR_solow <- pwt_solow %>%
  filter(country == "Sierra Leone")

# Input Variables

SIR_a         <- SIR_solow$a[1]
SIR_s         <- SIR_solow$s[1]
SIR_n         <- SIR_solow$n[1]
SIR_d         <- SIR_solow$d[1]
SIR_A         <- SIR_solow$A[1]
SIR_k_current <- SIR_solow$k[1]
SIR_y_current <- SIR_solow$y[1]

# Steady State

SIR_k_star <- ((SIR_s * SIR_A) / (SIR_n + SIR_d))^(1 / (1 - SIR_a))
SIR_y_star <- SIR_A * SIR_k_star^SIR_a
SIR_sfk_star <- SIR_s * SIR_y_star

# Graph

SIR_solow_df <- data.frame(
  k = seq(0, SIR_k_current * 2, length.out = 500)
) %>%
  mutate(
    y = SIR_A * k^SIR_a,
    sfk = SIR_s * y,
    break_even = (SIR_n + SIR_d) * k
  )

SIR_last_point <- SIR_solow_df %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1)

ggplot(SIR_solow_df, aes(x = k)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = y), linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = sfk), linewidth = 1.2, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_line(aes(y = break_even), linewidth = 1.2, color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = SIR_k_star, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_point(aes(x = SIR_k_star, y = SIR_sfk_star), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = SIR_k_current, y = SIR_y_current), size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = SIR_last_point$k,
    y = SIR_last_point$y * 1.03,
    label = "y = f(k)",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = SIR_last_point$k,
    y = SIR_last_point$sfk * 1.03,
    label = "s f(k)",
    color = "darkgreen",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = SIR_last_point$k,
    y = SIR_last_point$break_even * 1.03,
    label = "(n + d)k",
    color = "red",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Solow Growth Model - Sierra Leone",
    x = "Capital per Worker (k)",
    y = "Output / Investment per Worker"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, max(SIR_solow_df$k) * 1.15),
    clip = "off"
  )

# Flextable

SIR_ss_points <- tibble(
  Point = c(
    "Steady-State Intersection",
    "Steady-State Production",
    "Current Production"
  ),
  x_coordinate = c(
    SIR_k_star,
    SIR_k_star,
    SIR_k_current
  ),
  y_coordinate = c(
    SIR_sfk_star,
    SIR_y_star,
    SIR_y_current
  )
)

SIR_ss_points_ft <- SIR_ss_points %>%
  mutate(
    x_coordinate = round(x_coordinate, 2),
    y_coordinate = round(y_coordinate, 2)
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = "Sierra Leone Solow Model Key Coordinates",
    colwidths = 3
  ) %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#D9D9D9") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  theme_box() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  valign(valign = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

SIR_ss_points_ft

```

### Togo

```{r}

# ======== Togo ========

TOG_solow <- pwt_solow %>%
  filter(country == "Togo")

# Input Variables

TOG_a         <- TOG_solow$a[1]
TOG_s         <- TOG_solow$s[1]
TOG_n         <- TOG_solow$n[1]
TOG_d         <- TOG_solow$d[1]
TOG_A         <- TOG_solow$A[1]
TOG_k_current <- TOG_solow$k[1]
TOG_y_current <- TOG_solow$y[1]

# Steady State

TOG_k_star <- ((TOG_s * TOG_A) / (TOG_n + TOG_d))^(1 / (1 - TOG_a))
TOG_y_star <- TOG_A * TOG_k_star^TOG_a
TOG_sfk_star <- TOG_s * TOG_y_star

# Graph

TOG_solow_df <- data.frame(
  k = seq(0, TOG_k_current * 2, length.out = 500)
) %>%
  mutate(
    y = TOG_A * k^TOG_a,
    sfk = TOG_s * y,
    break_even = (TOG_n + TOG_d) * k
  )

TOG_last_point <- TOG_solow_df %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1)

ggplot(TOG_solow_df, aes(x = k)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = y), linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = sfk), linewidth = 1.2, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_line(aes(y = break_even), linewidth = 1.2, color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = TOG_k_star, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_point(aes(x = TOG_k_star, y = TOG_sfk_star), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = TOG_k_current, y = TOG_y_current), size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = TOG_last_point$k,
    y = TOG_last_point$y * 1.03,
    label = "y = f(k)",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = TOG_last_point$k,
    y = TOG_last_point$sfk * 1.03,
    label = "s f(k)",
    color = "darkgreen",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = TOG_last_point$k,
    y = TOG_last_point$break_even * 1.03,
    label = "(n + d)k",
    color = "red",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Solow Growth Model - Togo",
    x = "Capital per Worker (k)",
    y = "Output / Investment per Worker"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, max(TOG_solow_df$k) * 1.15),
    clip = "off"
  )

# Flextable

TOG_ss_points <- tibble(
  Point = c(
    "Steady-State Intersection",
    "Steady-State Production",
    "Current Production"
  ),
  x_coordinate = c(
    TOG_k_star,
    TOG_k_star,
    TOG_k_current
  ),
  y_coordinate = c(
    TOG_sfk_star,
    TOG_y_star,
    TOG_y_current
  )
)

TOG_ss_points_ft <- TOG_ss_points %>%
  mutate(
    x_coordinate = round(x_coordinate, 2),
    y_coordinate = round(y_coordinate, 2)
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = "Togo Solow Model Key Coordinates",
    colwidths = 3
  ) %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#D9D9D9") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  theme_box() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  valign(valign = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

TOG_ss_points_ft
```

### United States

```{r}

# ======== United States ========

USA_solow <- pwt_solow %>%
  filter(country == "United States")

# Input Variables

USA_a         <- USA_solow$a[1]
USA_s         <- USA_solow$s[1]
USA_n         <- USA_solow$n[1]
USA_d         <- USA_solow$d[1]
USA_A         <- USA_solow$A[1]
USA_k_current <- USA_solow$k[1]
USA_y_current <- USA_solow$y[1]

# Steady State

USA_k_star <- ((USA_s * USA_A) / (USA_n + USA_d))^(1 / (1 - USA_a))
USA_y_star <- USA_A * USA_k_star^USA_a
USA_sfk_star <- USA_s * USA_y_star

# Graph

USA_solow_df <- data.frame(
  k = seq(0, USA_k_current * 2, length.out = 500)
) %>%
  mutate(
    y = USA_A * k^USA_a,
    sfk = USA_s * y,
    break_even = (USA_n + USA_d) * k
  )

USA_last_point <- USA_solow_df %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1)

ggplot(USA_solow_df, aes(x = k)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = y), linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = sfk), linewidth = 1.2, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_line(aes(y = break_even), linewidth = 1.2, color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = USA_k_star, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_point(aes(x = USA_k_star, y = USA_sfk_star), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = USA_k_current, y = USA_y_current), size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = USA_last_point$k,
    y = USA_last_point$y * 1.03,
    label = "y = f(k)",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = USA_last_point$k,
    y = USA_last_point$sfk * 1.03,
    label = "s f(k)",
    color = "darkgreen",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = USA_last_point$k,
    y = USA_last_point$break_even * 1.03,
    label = "(n + d)k",
    color = "red",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Solow Growth Model - United States",
    x = "Capital per Worker (k)",
    y = "Output / Investment per Worker"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, max(USA_solow_df$k) * 1.15),
    clip = "off"
  )

# Flextable

USA_ss_points <- tibble(
  Point = c(
    "Steady-State Intersection",
    "Steady-State Production",
    "Current Production"
  ),
  x_coordinate = c(
    USA_k_star,
    USA_k_star,
    USA_k_current
  ),
  y_coordinate = c(
    USA_sfk_star,
    USA_y_star,
    USA_y_current
  )
)

USA_ss_points_ft <- USA_ss_points %>%
  mutate(
    x_coordinate = round(x_coordinate, 2),
    y_coordinate = round(y_coordinate, 2)
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = "United States Solow Model Key Coordinates",
    colwidths = 3
  ) %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#D9D9D9") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  theme_box() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  valign(valign = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

USA_ss_points_ft
```

```{r}
# ======== United States ========

USA_solow <- pwt_solow %>%
  filter(country == "United States")

# Input Variables
USA_a         <- USA_solow$a[1]
USA_s         <- USA_solow$s[1]
USA_n         <- USA_solow$n[1]
USA_d         <- USA_solow$d[1]
USA_A         <- USA_solow$A[1]
USA_k_current <- USA_solow$k[1]
USA_y_current <- USA_solow$y[1]

# Steady State
USA_k_star   <- ((USA_s * USA_A) / (USA_n + USA_d))^(1 / (1 - USA_a))
USA_y_star   <- USA_A * USA_k_star^USA_a
USA_sfk_star <- USA_s * USA_y_star

# Golden Rule
USA_k_gold <- ((USA_a * USA_A) / (USA_n + USA_d))^(1 / (1 - USA_a))
USA_y_gold <- USA_A * USA_k_gold^USA_a
USA_c_gold <- USA_y_gold - (USA_n + USA_d) * USA_k_gold

# Graph
USA_solow_df <- data.frame(
  k = seq(0, max(USA_k_current, USA_k_gold) * 1.5, length.out = 500)
) %>%
  mutate(
    y          = USA_A * k^USA_a,
    sfk        = USA_s * y,
    break_even = (USA_n + USA_d) * k,
    mpk        = USA_a * USA_A * k^(USA_a - 1)
  )

USA_last_point <- USA_solow_df %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1)

ggplot(USA_solow_df, aes(x = k)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = y), linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = sfk), linewidth = 1.2, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_line(aes(y = break_even), linewidth = 1.2, color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = USA_k_star, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = USA_k_gold, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue") +
  geom_point(aes(x = USA_k_star, y = USA_sfk_star), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = USA_k_current, y = USA_y_current), size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(x = USA_k_gold, y = USA_y_gold), size = 2.5, color = "blue") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = USA_last_point$k,
    y = USA_last_point$y * 1.03,
    label = "y = f(k)",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = USA_last_point$k,
    y = USA_last_point$sfk * 1.03,
    label = "s f(k)",
    color = "darkgreen",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = USA_last_point$k,
    y = USA_last_point$break_even * 1.03,
    label = "(n + d)k",
    color = "red",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = USA_k_gold,
    y = USA_y_gold * 1.05,
    label = "k* gold",
    color = "blue",
    hjust = -0.1
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Solow Growth Model - United States",
    x = "Capital per Worker (k)",
    y = "Output / Investment per Worker"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, max(USA_solow_df$k) * 1.15),
    clip = "off"
  )

# Flextable
USA_ss_points <- tibble(
  Point = c(
    "Steady-State Intersection",
    "Steady-State Production",
    "Current Production",
    "Golden Rule Capital",
    "Golden Rule Output",
    "Golden Rule Consumption"
  ),
  x_coordinate = c(
    USA_k_star,
    USA_k_star,
    USA_k_current,
    USA_k_gold,
    USA_k_gold,
    USA_k_gold
  ),
  y_coordinate = c(
    USA_sfk_star,
    USA_y_star,
    USA_y_current,
    USA_y_gold,
    USA_y_gold,
    USA_c_gold
  )
)

USA_ss_points_ft <- USA_ss_points %>%
  mutate(
    x_coordinate = round(x_coordinate, 2),
    y_coordinate = round(y_coordinate, 2)
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = "United States Solow Model Key Coordinates",
    colwidths = 3
  ) %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#D9D9D9") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  theme_box() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  valign(valign = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

USA_ss_points_ft
```

```{r}
# ======== Cameroon ========

CMR_solow <- pwt_solow %>%
  filter(country == "Cameroon")

# Input Variables
CMR_a         <- CMR_solow$a[1]
CMR_s         <- CMR_solow$s[1]
CMR_n         <- CMR_solow$n[1]
CMR_d         <- CMR_solow$d[1]
CMR_A         <- CMR_solow$A[1]
CMR_k_current <- CMR_solow$k[1]
CMR_y_current <- CMR_solow$y[1]

# Steady State
CMR_k_star   <- ((CMR_s * CMR_A) / (CMR_n + CMR_d))^(1 / (1 - CMR_a))
CMR_y_star   <- CMR_A * CMR_k_star^CMR_a
CMR_sfk_star <- CMR_s * CMR_y_star

# Golden Rule
CMR_k_gold <- ((CMR_a * CMR_A) / (CMR_n + CMR_d))^(1 / (1 - CMR_a))
CMR_y_gold <- CMR_A * CMR_k_gold^CMR_a
CMR_c_gold <- CMR_y_gold - (CMR_n + CMR_d) * CMR_k_gold

# Graph
CMR_solow_df <- data.frame(
  k = seq(0, max(CMR_k_current, CMR_k_gold) * 1.5, length.out = 500)
) %>%
  mutate(
    y          = CMR_A * k^CMR_a,
    sfk        = CMR_s * y,
    break_even = (CMR_n + CMR_d) * k,
    mpk        = CMR_a * CMR_A * k^(CMR_a - 1)
  )

CMR_last_point <- CMR_solow_df %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1)

ggplot(CMR_solow_df, aes(x = k)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = y), linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
  geom_line(aes(y = sfk), linewidth = 1.2, color = "darkgreen") +
  geom_line(aes(y = break_even), linewidth = 1.2, color = "red") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = CMR_k_star, linetype = "dotted") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = CMR_k_gold, linetype = "dashed", color = "blue") +
  geom_point(aes(x = CMR_k_star, y = CMR_sfk_star), size = 2) +
  geom_point(aes(x = CMR_k_current, y = CMR_y_current), size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  geom_point(aes(x = CMR_k_gold, y = CMR_y_gold), size = 2.5, color = "blue") +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = CMR_last_point$k,
    y = CMR_last_point$y * 1.03,
    label = "y = f(k)",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = CMR_last_point$k,
    y = CMR_last_point$sfk * 1.03,
    label = "s f(k)",
    color = "darkgreen",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = CMR_last_point$k,
    y = CMR_last_point$break_even * 1.03,
    label = "(n + d)k",
    color = "red",
    hjust = 0
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = CMR_k_gold,
    y = CMR_y_gold * 1.05,
    label = "k* gold",
    color = "blue",
    hjust = -0.1
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Solow Growth Model - Cameroon",
    x = "Capital per Worker (k)",
    y = "Output / Investment per Worker"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, max(CMR_solow_df$k) * 1.15),
    clip = "off"
  )

# Flextable
CMR_ss_points <- tibble(
  Point = c(
    "Steady-State Intersection",
    "Steady-State Production",
    "Current Production",
    "Golden Rule Capital",
    "Golden Rule Output",
    "Golden Rule Consumption"
  ),
  x_coordinate = c(
    CMR_k_star,
    CMR_k_star,
    CMR_k_current,
    CMR_k_gold,
    CMR_k_gold,
    CMR_k_gold
  ),
  y_coordinate = c(
    CMR_sfk_star,
    CMR_y_star,
    CMR_y_current,
    CMR_y_gold,
    CMR_y_gold,
    CMR_c_gold
  )
)

CMR_ss_points_ft <- CMR_ss_points %>%
  mutate(
    x_coordinate = round(x_coordinate, 2),
    y_coordinate = round(y_coordinate, 2)
  ) %>%
  flextable() %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = "Cameroon Solow Model Key Coordinates",
    colwidths = 3
  ) %>%
  bg(part = "header", bg = "#D9D9D9") %>%
  bold(part = "header") %>%
  theme_box() %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  valign(valign = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit()

CMR_ss_points_ft
```
